hooks.command: $ProgressPreference = "SilentlyContinue"; $root = (& git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>$null); if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($root)) { $root = (Resolve-Path '.').Path }; $infraPath = Join-Path $root 'infrastructure'; if (-not (Test-Path $infraPath)) { exit 0 }; Push-Location $infraPath; try { $failed = $false; $messages = New-Object System.Collections.Generic.List[string]; $validateOutput = (& terraform validate 2>&1 | Out-String); $validateExit = $LASTEXITCODE; if ($validateExit -ne 0) { $failed = $true; $messages.Add('--- terraform validate ---'); $messages.Add($validateOutput) }; if ($failed) { $reasonText = "Terraform checks failed. Fix before finishing turn:`n`n" + ($messages -join "`n"); $reasonText = [regex]::Replace($reasonText, "`e\[[0-9;]*[A-Za-z]", ""); $reasonText = [regex]::Replace($reasonText, "[\x00-\x08\x0B\x0C\x0E-\x1F]", ""); $payload = @{ decision = 'block'; reason = $reasonText } | ConvertTo-Json -Compress; [Console]::Out.Write($payload) } } finally { Pop-Location }; exit 0

$out = & make lint 2>&1; $rc = $LASTEXITCODE; if ($rc -ne 0) { $reason = "Phase 0 exit criteria failed (make lint exit=$rc). Fix lint errors before finishing turn:`n`n" + ($out -join "`n"); @{ decision = "block"; reason = $reason } | ConvertTo-Json -Compress }; exit 0

$backendPath = Join-Path (Resolve-Path '.').Path 'backend'; if (-not (Test-Path $backendPath)) { exit 0 }; Push-Location $backendPath; try { $output = @(); $failed = $false; $buildOutput = & go build ./... 2>&1; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { $output += '--- go build ---'; $output += ($buildOutput -join "`n"); $failed = $true }; $vetOutput = & go vet ./... 2>&1; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { $output += '--- go vet ---'; $output += ($vetOutput -join "`n"); $failed = $true }; $testOutput = & go test ./... 2>&1; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { $output += '--- go test ---'; $output += ($testOutput -join "`n"); $failed = $true }; if ($failed) { $reason = "Backend Go checks failed. Fix before finishing turn:`n`n" + ($output -join "`n"); @{ decision = 'block'; reason = $reason } | ConvertTo-Json -Compress } } finally { Pop-Location }; exit 0

$agentPath = Join-Path (Resolve-Path '.').Path 'agent'; if (-not (Test-Path $agentPath)) { exit 0 }; Push-Location $agentPath; try { $output = & npm run test 2>&1; $rc = $LASTEXITCODE; if ($rc -ne 0) { $reason = "Agent tests failed (npm run test exit=$rc). Fix before finishing turn:`n`n" + ($output -join "`n"); @{ decision = 'block'; reason = $reason } | ConvertTo-Json -Compress } } finally { Pop-Location }; exit 0

$frontendPath = Join-Path (Resolve-Path '.').Path 'frontend'; if (-not (Test-Path $frontendPath)) { exit 0 }; Push-Location $frontendPath; try { $output = & npm run test 2>&1; $rc = $LASTEXITCODE; if ($rc -ne 0) { $reason = "Frontend tests failed (npm run test exit=$rc). Fix before finishing turn:`n`n" + ($output -join "`n"); @{ decision = 'block'; reason = $reason } | ConvertTo-Json -Compress } } finally { Pop-Location }; exit 0
